examples: Relax, kid, we're not about to roust you. We just want some information.
I'm going up around the corner here, to roust out my driver.
We were parked right behind the doomed mob, so I hurried out to roust Heidi and move the car to safety.
He is a driven man who is said to roust his lieutenants most mornings for conference calls that begin at 6:30 a.m.
